_help.buffer: Padding (pixels/voxels) added around the detected region.
_help.cellprob_threshold: Cellpose cell probability threshold parameter. Lower values will yield more masks, including more false positives potentially.
_help.classNames: List of class names for analysis. For example ['Control', 'LOF'] or ['CGN_Control', 'GNP_nipblLOF']. These names are used for labeling the classes in the analysis and should correspond to the conditions/groups in your dataset. Separate conditions by _ or spaces or -.
_help.flow_threshold: Cellpose flow threshold parameter. Lower this is you see merged cell masks.
_help.requiredChannels: Channel indices that must pass the intensity-vs-background test for a crop to be kept. segmentationChannel is never tested. Indices >= channel count in an image are skipped for that image.
_help.segmentationChannel: Channel index used for segmentation input.
_help.signalThreshold: Threshold applied to signal when generating segmentation classes.
_help.singleChannel: If True, expect single-channel input and skip checks for multiple channels.
_help.tile_norm_blocksize: Cellpose tile normalization block size parameter. Reduce if running into memory usage issues.
_help.verboseMessages: If True, print verbose debugging messages.
